info.name: Room Rental Management System API
info.description: Complete REST API collection for room-rental-management-system

request.description: Login with username and password. Returns redirect to dashboard on success.
Logout current user. Returns redirect to login page.
Get main dashboard with summary statistics and current month payment status
Get list of all buildings
Get form to create new building
Create a new building
Get form to edit building
Update an existing building
Delete a building (must have no rooms)
List all rooms. Optional filters: building_id, status (available, occupied, maintenance)
Get form to create new room
Create a new room
Get form to edit room
Update an existing room
Get detailed view of a room including tenant history and receipts
Delete a room (must have no active tenant)
Get form to add tenant to a room
Add a new tenant to a room
Get form to edit tenant
Update tenant information
View outstanding balances and checkout options before tenant checkout
Write off all outstanding balances for tenant before checkout
Check out a tenant from a room (move to history)
Get list of water, electricity, and fee prices with history
Update utility price (water, electricity, or fee)
Get current water and electricity prices as JSON
Step 1: Choose billing period and which rooms to record
Step 2: Mobile-friendly form to enter meter readings for selected rooms
Save meter readings for billing period
Get staged utility readings for a room (used by receipt generation form)
Get printable sheet for thermal 58mm printer
Generate ESC/POS bitmap for Android Print Bridge (PT-210)
List receipts for a billing month. Optional filters: status (paid, unpaid, partial, deferred), building_id
Verify a payment using verification code (8 hex characters)
Get form to generate new receipt
Create a new receipt for a room
Get detailed view of a receipt including payment logs
Record a payment for a receipt
Delete the last payment log entry (with reason)
Defer receipt balance to next month
Restore deferred receipt to active status
Get form to edit receipt details
Update receipt details
Get receipt in Khmer table format for 58mm thermal printer
Generate ESC/POS bitmap for Android Print Bridge (PT-210)
Get reports main page
Get detailed revenue breakdown (room fees, utilities, service fees)
Get monthly payment summary with collection rate
Get annual revenue by month (expected vs collected)
Get overdue payments and upcoming due dates
Get occupancy rate by building
Get settings page (Google Drive backup, database management)
Upload Google OAuth client JSON file
Save Google Drive folder ID for backups
Initiate Google OAuth flow to authorize Drive access
OAuth callback endpoint (handled automatically)
Trigger immediate backup to Google Drive
Test Google Drive connection by uploading and deleting a test file
Download current database as .db file
Restore database from uploaded .db file
Disconnect from Google Drive and remove authorization
